description: Computes normalized unit vector from line, vector, or two points
utility: Get direction vector with magnitude 1 for use in positioning and alignment

arguments.name: object
arguments.type: line | vector | point point | number number
arguments.description: Line/vector to normalize, two points, or two coordinates

alternates: norm(p1, p2) - direction from p1 to p2
norm(x, y) - normalized direction of (x, y)

examples.expression: dir = norm(L); P = point(g, placeat(start(g,L), buff(0.5, dir)))
